title: logfia gallica
intro: Logfia gallica, also known as filaginella or sticky mouse tail, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Campanulaceae. It is native to Europe, Asia, and North Africa, and has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Logfia gallica include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce swelling and pain, and promote wound healing. The herbal preparations of Logfia gallica include teas, infusions, and topical applications, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including skin problems and respiratory issues.
